---
title: "Contact"
description: "Contact information for CogDyn Lab"
---

## Email

<jungtakp@gmail.com>

## Address

CogDyn Lab  
Department, University  
Building / Room  
Street Address  
City, Country

## Directions

Add campus map, building entrance information, parking, and public transportation notes here.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/cogdynlab)
- [University profile](https://example.edu)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com)
